introSection: Hot Wheels Twin Mill Racer is an upcoming steel roller coaster located at Mattel Adventure Park in Glendale, Arizona, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Hot Wheels Twin Mill Racer will be a Chance Rides Hyper GT-X Coaster, similar to Lightning Run at Kentucky Kingdom. Unlike Lightning Run, it will feature inversions, becoming the first one to do so.

fullText:
Hot Wheels Twin Mill Racer is an upcoming steel roller coaster located at Mattel Adventure Park in Glendale, Arizona, USA.

Hot Wheels Twin Mill Racer will be a Chance Rides Hyper GT-X Coaster, similar to Lightning Run at Kentucky Kingdom. Unlike Lightning Run, it will feature inversions, becoming the first one to do so.
